sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 16.8 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.16)

statement.latex: The width\/$w(G')$of the derived subgroup$G'$of a finite non-abelian group$G$is the smallest positive integer$m$such that every element of$G'$is a product of$m$commutators. Is it true that the maximum value of the ratio$w(G')/|G|$is$1/6$(attained at the symmetric group${ S}_3$)? { V.\,G.\,Bardakov} Yes, it is (T.\,Bonner, J.\,Algebra, 320 (2008), 3165--3171).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
